title: ottelia ovalifolia
intro: Ottelia ovalifolia, also known as the oval-leaved Ottelia, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Hydrocharitaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Ottelia ovalifolia include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Ottelia ovalifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are often used to treat various health conditions in traditional medicine.
